messages.text: A droning lullaby drags you helplessly under; you slump into an enchanted sleep, unable to act.
{name} slumps into an enchanted sleep, lulled helpless by a droning lullaby.
The enchanted sleep releases you and your senses swim back into focus.
{name} stirs and shakes off the enchanted sleep.
{name} is slumped in an enchanted sleep, helpless and unable to act.
